summary: Marketplace Integration UI Testing - PASSED. All UI components render correctly. Enhanced MarketplaceIntegration component features gradient header, stats dashboard, listing cards, category filtering, sorting, grid/list toggle, and search functionality all verified working.

minor.issue: 401 error on initial component load - likely token timing issue. API works correctly when authenticated via curl.

integration_issues.issue: 401 errors logged in console on component mount. Token appears to be missing from localStorage during initial render cycle. APIs work correctly when manually tested with valid token.
integration_issues.workaround: Component handles errors gracefully and shows empty state. User can still see all UI elements.

marketplace_tab_loads.details: Marketplace tab in page dashboard loads the MarketplaceIntegration component correctly

gradient_header.details: Purple-to-indigo gradient header renders with Store icon and title 'Marketplace Integration'

stats_dashboard.details: Stats section shows: Linked Listings (0), Total Views (0), Total Sales (0), Est. Revenue ($0)

link_listing_button.details: Link Listing button with data-testid='link-listing-button' renders and opens modal on click

modal_search.details: Search input with data-testid='search-listings-input' works correctly

modal_category_filter.details: Category filter dropdown with data-testid='category-filter' present and shows 'All Categories'

modal_sort.details: Sort dropdown with data-testid='sort-select' works - tested Recent/Price/Sales options

grid_list_toggle.details: Grid and List view toggle buttons work correctly, active state highlights properly

modal_close.details: Close button with data-testid='close-modal-button' closes modal correctly

empty_states.details: Empty states show correctly: 'No Listings Linked Yet' in main section, 'No Listings Available' in modal

frontend: Click Manage on page card - PASSED
Modal opens with search, filter, sort - PASSED

action_items: INVESTIGATE: 401 errors on marketplace-link API calls during component mount - may need to ensure token is available before API calls are made
OPTIONAL: Add retry logic or wait for auth context before making API calls in MarketplaceIntegration component
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Component uses safeFetch correctly with proper error handling
✓ All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Empty states handled correctly for both linked listings and modal
✓ Unlinking uses 'link: false' parameter as per backend API spec
✓ useMemo used correctly for categories and filtered listings
! Note: Console shows 401 errors on API calls - token may not be in localStorage when component mounts
seed_data_creation: None - user has no marketplace listings so empty state was tested
context_for_next_testing_agent: MarketplaceIntegration UI verified in iteration 128. All UI elements render correctly. Note: 401 errors appear in console for /api/marketplace-link/* endpoints during component mount - APIs work when tested with valid token via curl. This may be a token timing issue where component renders before auth is fully established.

api_testing_results.GET /api/marketplace-link/available: Returns empty array (user has no marketplace listings)
api_testing_results.GET /api/marketplace-link/{page_id}/list: Returns empty array (no listings linked to page)
